highest_value_action: Capture/hash selected product and source screenshots, starting with ChatGPT, Enterprise, Gemini/Bard, Copilot, Claude Code, and API/tool surfaces.
blocked_until: Raster sha256, HTML/source hash, capture timestamp, URL/title, caption blockers, and rights/fair-use review exist.

target_state: All selected photos license-cleared or replaced
highest_value_action: Verify ASML/cleanroom/rack/data-center/substation/gas/nuclear photo licenses and drop weak or risky rows.
blocked_until: Exact license, author, revision, attribution, and blocked physical-infrastructure claims are recorded.

target_state: One safe representation per GTC claim job
highest_value_action: Choose page 29 card versus slide/source render and avoid duplicate GTC thesis surfaces.
blocked_until: Rights/fair-use review and Chapter 15/16 layout decision are recorded.

target_state: Chapters 2-5 reach at least three strong exhibits each
highest_value_action: Execute source cards and canonical paper redraws for early LM, Transformer, scaling, and GPT/API/Codex source texture.
blocked_until: Page refs, quote limits, redraw specs, and source provenance are complete.

target_state: All redraw_now rows either executed or demoted
highest_value_action: Extract page/figure refs and draft house-style redraw specs before adding new visual categories.
blocked_until: Figure/page provenance, copyright/fair-use rationale, and final SVG/readability checks are complete.

target_state: No chapter exceeds four selected exhibits without explicit exception
highest_value_action: Prune Chapters 7, 9-12, 14-16, and 18-20 after spread-level render tests.
blocked_until: A replacement/drop record exists and final layout demonstrates better rhythm.

highest_value_action: Extract exact snippets or paraphrase fallbacks from the source-card candidate package.
blocked_until: Quote-limit audit, page refs, source IDs, and blocked claims are recorded.

target_state: Reserves are promoted only by replacement
highest_value_action: Use I-0194 and I-0195 shortlists to replace weak selected rows, not inflate the exhibit count.
blocked_until: A top-100 replacement decision is recorded and the old row becomes reserve/drop.

target_state: Every selected non-ready row has manifest-ready provenance
highest_value_action: When captures/redraws finish, update assets_manifest with hashes, rights, captions, story purpose, and blockers.
blocked_until: No selected row lacks provenance, rights status, story purpose, or blocked-claim note.

target_state: All final exhibits pass layout/readability QA
highest_value_action: Render the full book and check captions, references, overflows, duplicate visuals, and source density around exhibits.
blocked_until: Full-book PDF render passes without broken refs, unreadable charts, missing captions, or ugly layout failures.
